description_long: This object is a vintage IBM computer monitor with an integrated keyboard, typical of late 20th-century office equipment. The monitor features a large, boxy CRT display with a slightly curved screen, surrounded by a thick, matte-finished bezel. The front panel displays a monochrome green interface with retro graphics and text, and the IBM logo is prominently placed below the screen. The keyboard is attached directly in front of the monitor, featuring a mix of white, gray, and black keys, with a few colored function keys for added contrast. The casing is made of light gray plastic with subtle ventilation grilles on the top and rear, and a power cable extends from the back. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function over form.
description: A vintage IBM CRT computer monitor with an integrated keyboard, thick bezel, and light gray plastic casing. The front displays a green monochrome interface and the IBM logo.
description_view_0: Side view showing the monitor's deep, boxy profile and the attached keyboard extending forward, with the power cable visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the CRT screen with green monochrome display, thick bezel, IBM logo, and the full keyboard layout.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the monitor's depth, keyboard, and cable, but from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the large, vented back panel and the slot at the bottom, with the cable emerging from the side.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thick, matte, and made of plastic, with rounded corners and a dark color contrasting the lighter casing. It features a simple, utilitarian design with no decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The monitor is supported by an integrated, sloped base that merges with the keyboard housing, made of the same light gray plastic and lacking visible adjustability.
attribute_button_placement: Physical buttons are located on the lower right of the front bezel, grouped together below the screen.
attribute_brand_logo: The IBM logo is present on the center bottom bezel below the screen and also on the keyboard, rendered in white on a black background.
